creator: chinsan.tw@gmail.com
text:
FYI, Port maintainer approved.

On 7/9/07, Gregory Edigarov <greg@bestnet.kharkov.ua> wrote:
> chinsan wrote:
> > On 7/7/07, Petar Petrov <pesho.petrov@gmail.com> wrote:
> >> Hello,
> >> looks like we had two PRs updating sflowtool to latest version. It was
> >> my mistake not checking if there is a PR already, just before
> >> submitting the new one. There wasn't the day before ...
> >>
> >> The PRs are:
> >> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114102
> >> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114140
> >>
> >> Since 114140 was approved and committed, maybe the right thing to do
> >> now is to add WWW to pkg-descr and close 114102 too. Do we need
> >> another maintainer approval for that?
> >
> > Hi, Petar:
> >
> > It's fine for me.  But I think we should also need the port
> > maintainer's approval.
> > (To Gregory: Do you approve to WWW to pkg-descr? :)
> >
> >
> Ok with me.
>
>
>
> --
> With best regards,
>     Gregory Edigarov
>
>
